prompt: Add self-learning memory, traction research, TinTin oversight page, and Copilot findings when possible.
commands_or_evidence: Added references/self-learning.md with per-repo memory/result-log design and privacy controls.
Added research/traction-plan.md with launch, review, benchmark, and community strategy.
Updated TinTin cockpit static page with protected end-to-end-loop facts route.
Copilot CLI/gh-copilot unavailable; gh auth status reports not logged in.

acceptance_criteria.evidence: SKILL.md, README.md, references/self-learning.md, references/evaluation.md, and report-template.md updated.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Traction and pre-release review strategy exists
acceptance_criteria.evidence: research/traction-plan.md added with Tijmen review gate before public pre-release.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Copilot findings are included if possible
acceptance_criteria.evidence: No copilot/gh-copilot command found and gh is not authenticated; unavailability documented.

learning_candidates.text: Self-learning is core skill behavior: compact per-repo memory/result logs, privacy-safe only.
First public pre-release requires Tijmen's explicit repo review and approval.
Copilot findings unavailable locally: no copilot/gh-copilot command and gh not authenticated.
learning_candidates.reason: Relevant to push/review workflow until setup changes.

copilot_findings.summary: Copilot CLI/gh-copilot not installed or not on PATH; gh auth status says not logged in.

notes: Repo-only docs/process update; TinTin page deploy handled separately in Firebase source.
